response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrates craftsmanship through TDD, CI/CD, and open-source work. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, A/B testing, or growth/measurement infrastructure — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and lack of evidence of cross-org platform leadership at the scale expected for Principal also raise concerns about seniority fit.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience with production systems at scale (Dunnhumby micro-services handling millions of req/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship foundation: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, open-source tooling
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators) aligns with AI-first direction
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems — the core domain of this role
Limited evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure work or statistical/experimental analysis competency
Career trajectory peaks at Staff with no clear track record of Principal-level cross-org platform leadership influencing multiple teams

key_factors.factor: Years of polyglot engineering experience meets bar
Insufficient evidence of Principal/IC6-level systemic leadership
